---
name: Skill request
about: Request a new skill for a crypto protocol, exchange, or tool
title: "[Skill Request] "
labels: skill-request
assignees: ''

---

## Protocol / Project

- **Name:** (e.g., Aave, Uniswap, Kraken)
- **Website:** (e.g., https://aave.com)
- **Category:** (e.g., `defi`, `exchanges`, `chains` — see README for all categories)

## Why This Skill Is Needed

Describe the use case. What would an AI agent be able to do with this skill?

## Key Features

What capabilities should the skill cover? For example:

- [ ] Read market data / prices
- [ ] Execute trades or transactions
- [ ] Monitor positions or balances
- [ ] Fetch analytics or historical data
- [ ] Other: ___

## API Documentation

Link to the project's API docs, SDK, or developer resources:

-

## Existing Integrations

Are there any existing tools, libraries, or MCP servers for this project that could be referenced?

-

## Priority

- [ ] High — widely used protocol with many potential users
- [ ] Medium — useful but niche
- [ ] Low — nice to have

## Additional Context

Any other information that would help someone build this skill.
